content: The goal of Spartacus was to gain freedom and to allow all his followers to return to their respective homelands of origin, in Thrace, Gaul, Germany.
credits: Sentence from Tatoeba by Opiejay888 (CC-BY 2.0 FR)
relationships: ita:Lo scopo di Spartaco era quello di ottenere la libertà e di consentire a tutti i suoi seguaci di far ritorno nelle rispe
